title: as-bench configuration
description: Configuration for the as-bench benchmarking framework. Precedence: built-in defaults < this file < --mode overlay < CLI flags.

settings.description: Engine tunables. These override the settings.* values set inside benchmark files (they flow to the wasm via the tune hook), and are themselves overridden by CLI flags.

warmupTime.description: Warmup time cap in milliseconds. Adaptive warmup may exit earlier once timings stabilize.

warmupMinTime.description: Earliest point (ms) at which adaptive warmup may declare convergence.

warmupTolerance.description: Relative drift between consecutive warmup batches considered stable (0.02 = 2%). 0 disables adaptive exit (criterion-style fixed-time warmup).

measurementTime.description: Target measurement time in milliseconds across all samples of a bench.

sampleSize.description: Number of timed samples collected per bench.

numResamples.description: Bootstrap resamples used for confidence intervals and comparisons.

samplingMode.description: linear scales iterations across samples (enables the slope estimate); flat uses a constant count; auto picks per bench.

confidenceLevel.description: Confidence level for all interval bounds (0.95 = 95% CI).

render.description: Host-side result rendering thresholds (the engine does not use these).

significanceLevel.description: p-value threshold below which a delta counts as statistically significant.

noiseThreshold.description: Deltas whose entire confidence interval lies within ±this ratio render as 'no change' (criterion's rule).

buildOptions.description: How bench files are compiled with asc.

optimize.description: Pass --optimize to asc. Note: optimization level interacts with V8 tier heuristics on the node runtime; external runtimes (wasmtime etc.) are tier-free.

debug.description: Pass --debug to asc (keeps the name section + debug info). Profile builds add this automatically.

args.description: Extra asc arguments appended to every bench build (e.g. ["--enable", "simd"]).

top.description: Rows shown per bench in the heaviest-calls table.

all.description: Include engine/runtime-internal rows in profile tables.

input.description: Benchmark file globs (positional CLI arguments override).

runtime.description: node (in-process host) | wasmtime | wasmer | wazero | a command template containing <file>. External runtimes run a pure-WASI build reporting over framed stdout; --baseline comparison and --deterministic need node.

verbose.description: Print every estimate (mean/median/std dev/MAD/slope) and warmup convergence per bench.

deterministic.description: Record host imports on iteration 2 of each bench and replay them for every later iteration — neutralizes host nondeterminism. node runtime only; adds a few ns of per-iteration overhead, so compare deterministic runs with deterministic runs.

modes.description: Named partial-config overlays selected with --mode <name>. A mode may override any top-level option; objects merge one level deep, scalars and arrays replace.
